query:
SELECT id,
                      username,
                      nombre_visible,
                      avatar_url,
                      COALESCE(verificado, FALSE) AS "verificado!",
                      COALESCE(total_seguidores, 0) AS "total_seguidores!"
               FROM usuarios_ext
               WHERE estado = 'activo'
                 AND es_seed = FALSE
                 AND (username ILIKE $1 OR nombre_visible ILIKE $1)
               ORDER BY COALESCE(total_seguidores, 0) DESC, id DESC
               LIMIT $2
